scripts.test: npm run build && node dist/index.js test
scripts.chat: npm run build && node dist/index.js chat
scripts.chat headless: npm run build && node dist/index.js chat --headless
scripts.chat:siliconflow: npm run build && node dist/index.js chat --provider siliconflow
scripts.chat:agentrouter: npm run build && node dist/index.js chat --provider agentrouter
scripts.chat:doubao: npm run build && node dist/index.js chat --provider doubao
scripts.chat:doubao headless: npm run build && node dist/index.js chat --headless --provider doubao
scripts.chat:mimo: npm run build && node dist/index.js chat --provider mimo
scripts.chat:mimo headless: npm run build && node dist/index.js chat --headless --provider mimo
